---
title: "Francisco José Benavides Murillo"
subtitle: "Computational Scientist | Expert in High-Performance Computing (HPC) & Physics-Informed Modeling"
about:
  id: Frank
  template: trestles
  image: assets/img/LKProfilePhoto.png
  image-alt: "Foto de Tu Nombre"
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/tu-usuario
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/tu-usuario
    - icon: envelope
      text: Correo
      href: "mailto:tu@correo.com"
listing:
  - id: proyectos-destacados
    contents: proyectos/*/index.ipynb
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 2
    sort: "date desc"
    max-items: 4
    fields: [image, title, description, categories]
    filter-ui: false
    sort-ui: false
    include:
      destacado: "true"
    field-display-names:
      description: " "
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

:::{#hero}

PhD-trained Computational Scientist and Applied Mathematician specializing in the design of high-fidelity numerical simulations and large-scale algorithmic optimization. With over 15 years of experience, I have bridged the gap between abstract mathematical theory and industrial-grade implementations across Energy (Digital Rock Physics), FinTech, and the Gaming industry. Expert in solving ill-posed inverse problems and optimizing low-level computational kernels (C++, CUDA, Intel TBB) for massive datasets. I combine rigorous scientific inquiry with a software architecture mindset to deliver scalable, high-impact technical solutions.
:::


[Ver todos los proyectos →](proyectos/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
